---
title: "Home"
---

::: {.hero}
## Portfolio site

I support thriving communities with contextual data. 

[Learn more](about.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[View projects](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

## What I do

Data person providing strategic and operational support through analysis, insights, and visualization.

## Featured work

- [Project or resource title](projects.qmd)
- [Another useful link](https://quarto.org/docs/websites/)

## Contact

Please don't contact me.
